evidence_direction_note: MECH-220 (hub coordination) is non_contributory: fwd_r2 < -0.89 in ALL conditions including NO_HUB, and stream_corr is identical across NO_HUB/S_TO_A_HUB/BIDI_HUB within each seed -- the hub has zero effect because ARC-033/E2HarmSForward is not learning (forward model prerequisite missing). The experiment cannot distinguish hub effects from no-hub when the baseline forward model is already broken. SD-011 per-claim direction (supports) stands: C2 (stream distinctness) passed with ceiling=0.85 across 3 seeds. Overall direction set to non_contributory because the primary claim under test (MECH-220) cannot be evaluated.
